steps.title: Read line k slope
steps.content:
Line $k$ is written in slope-intercept form.
$$y=7x+\frac{1}{8}$$
In $y=mx+b$, the slope is $m$, so line $k$ has slope $7$.

steps.title: Use perpendicular slopes
steps.content: Perpendicular lines have slopes that are opposite reciprocals. The opposite reciprocal of $7$ is $$-\frac{1}{7}$$ The answer is B.
